tasks.label: ChatBot Operator: Full CI Pipeline
tasks.detail: Platform-agnostic CI workflow. Runs the complete CI pipeline (lint, test, build, scan, sign, package). This is the same target that GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and Tekton wrap. References: docs/omen/strategy.json (Developer Environment Goal DG001), docs/adr/architecture-decisions.md (ADR-012 - Platform-agnostic CI/CD)

tasks.label: ChatBot Operator: Lint
tasks.detail: Runs all linting checks. Same target wrapped by CI platforms.

tasks.label: ChatBot Operator: Test
tasks.detail: Runs all tests (unit, integration, validation, behavior). Same target wrapped by CI platforms.

tasks.label: ChatBot Operator: Build
tasks.detail: Builds the application. Same target wrapped by CI platforms.

tasks.label: ChatBot Operator: Security Scan
tasks.detail: Runs security scanning. Same target wrapped by CI platforms.

tasks.label: ChatBot Operator: Sign Artifacts
tasks.detail: Signs artifacts. Same target wrapped by CI platforms.

tasks.label: ChatBot Operator: Package
tasks.detail: Packages artifacts. Same target wrapped by CI platforms.

tasks.label: ChatBot Operator: Install Dependencies
tasks.detail: Installs all dependencies (Go, Node, tools). Same target wrapped by CI platforms.

tasks.label: ChatBot Operator: Clean
tasks.detail: Cleans all build artifacts. Same target wrapped by CI platforms.

tasks.label: Generate: GitHub Actions Workflow
tasks.detail: Generates GitHub Actions workflow configuration that wraps the Make targets.

tasks.label: Generate: GitLab CI Configuration
tasks.detail: Generates GitLab CI/CD configuration that wraps the Make targets.

tasks.label: Generate: Tekton Pipeline
tasks.detail: Generates Tekton pipeline manifests that wrap the Make targets.

tasks.label: Generate: All Platform Configurations
tasks.detail: Generates all platform-specific CI/CD configurations (GitHub, GitLab, Tekton, VSCode).
